item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 42min Conor McCluskey, Conor Doherty and Eoin McEvoy all named to start for Derry against
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 42min Conor McCluskey, Conor Doherty and Eoin McEvoy all named to start for Derry against Antrim.
They've named Conor Glass at 11 in an interesting potential switch, with McEvoy at midfield. No Dan Higgins. 3 15 2 mil
